creator: chkno@dork.com
text:
ntpd dumps core if pieces of /etc/ntp.conf are larger than X bytes

Fix: 

src/contrib/ntp/ntpd/ntp_coonfig.c ?
How-To-Repeat: 
# cat > /etc/ntp.conf << EOF
server !
 !
 qqqqqqqqqqqqqqqqqqqqqqqqqqqqqqqqqqqqqqqq
EOF
# ntpd
(dumps core)

(with one less q, it emmits some syslog junk before crashing)
